body: Received Q2 bottle club shipment today. One Cask Strength bottle has Batch 5 label but the paperwork says Batch 6. Can you confirm which batch it actually is?

Hi Megan — thanks for catching this. Tyler is pulling the batch records now. All Batch 6 bottles went out in this shipment, so the label is incorrect. We'll send you a corrected label by mail today. The contents are definitively Batch 6.
Perfect, thank you for the quick response!
Hi, we're an Epic Systems team planning an offsite and would love a private distillery tour. About 14 people, preferably a Thursday or Friday afternoon in mid-June. Do you have availability?
Hi Mark! Yes — we have Thursday June 18 at 3 PM available for a group of 14. That's our 1.5-hour private tour with a hosted tasting flight. $28 per person. Shall I hold that slot for you?
June 18 at 3 PM works perfectly. Please hold it. I'll send payment through Stripe today.
Marco here from Osteria Grazia. Our last rye order was supposed to be 24 bottles but we only received 18. Invoice HS-2026-WHL-0312 reflects 24. Can you sort this out before the weekend?

Marco — Tyler here. I checked the packing records and you're right, we came up 6 short. My fault on staging. I'll have the remaining 6 bottles on a FedEx same-day pickup this afternoon. Tracking to follow.
Received. Thanks Tyler.
Hi — my bottle club annual renewal is coming up in a few weeks but the card on file expired. How do I update it?

Hi Megan! You can update it at shop.heartlandspiritsmadison.com under Account > Payment Methods. If you run into any trouble I can also process it manually over the phone — just call us at (608) 256-0440.
Hi — we're updating the fall cocktail menu at Pig in a Fur Coat. Would love to use the Driftless Gin in a fall drink. Can you send a 200ml sample and the botanicals spec sheet?
Star Liquor here. Invoice HS-2026-WHL-0318 is showing $1,512 but we had agreed on the wholesale rate that works out to $1,428. Can someone look at this?
I'm pulling the wholesale rate schedule now. We may have applied the standard retail-minus rate rather than your negotiated rate. Will have a corrected invoice to you by end of day.
Hi — I'm getting married October 11 and we are interested in a private buyout of your tasting room for a cocktail hour. About 60 guests, 6-8 PM. Could you send a quote?
Hi! Saw on Instagram that you have a cask strength bourbon. My husband has been waiting for this. How do I buy one? Is it online or tasting room only?

Hi! The Cask Strength Batch 6 is available tasting-room only for now, or via our online shop. We still have about 62 bottles. You can order at shop.heartlandspiritsmadison.com or pick up any Thu–Sun during tasting room hours.
The Q2 Cask Strength is amazing — best bottle club shipment yet. Any hints on Q3?
Really glad you loved it! Q3 drops September — we're keeping it under wraps but it's something we're very proud of. Watch your email.
I'm from Green Bay and want to gift some Heartland Bourbon to family there. Which stores in the Fox Valley or Green Bay area carry your spirits?

Our Green Bay distribution is limited right now — best bet is Woodman's Madison if they're making a trip, or ordering through our online shop for WI shipping. We're expanding north distribution this fall.
